description_long: This is a square, cream-colored box of facial lotion labeled 'Natura Peau Parfaite Honey Flower Crème Visage Hydratation Intense.' The front features a honeycomb graphic and floral illustration, with the product name and key benefits in both French and English. The back displays detailed ingredient and usage information in small text, while the sides repeat the brand and product name with additional floral and honeycomb motifs. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard with a smooth, matte finish, and contains a round jar of lotion visible through a printed image on one side. The overall design is clean and elegant, with a focus on natural and hydrating themes. The packaging is likely intended for retail display and personal use.
description: A cream-colored, square box of 'Natura Peau Parfaite Honey Flower' facial lotion with honeycomb and floral graphics, featuring both French and English text. The packaging is smooth, matte, and visually emphasizes hydration and natural ingredients.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main label with honeycomb and floral graphics, product name, and key benefits in French and English.
description_view_1: Back view displays detailed ingredient and usage information in small text, with less prominent branding.
description_view_2: Side view features a printed image of the lotion jar inside, along with the product and brand name.
description_view_3: Opposite side view repeats the brand and product name with a floral motif and additional descriptive text.
attribute_product_name: Honey Flower Crème Visage Hydratation Intense
